questions.question: Which movies released in 2001 have reviews expressing an overall negative opinion?
Which Drama movies under 100 minutes have reviews that explicitly praise the acting or performances?
Which Comedy movies over 90 minutes have reviews that are overall unfavorable but still explicitly praise at least one specific aspect such as acting, direction, soundtrack, visuals, or effects?

dataset_policy: Each question contains 60 unique movie IDs with one review per movie. Movie IDs are disjoint across questions. Structured distractors are included so semantic evaluation requires deterministic pruning first.
